facebook_posts.text:
West Bradford Elementary School created a mural for Autism Acceptance Month, titled “Acceptance is Always in Bloom.” 🌸✨ Each grade level contributed a colorful piece of the garden!
#dasdproud #AutismAcceptanceMonth

Spring is in full bloom at Springton Manor Elementary School 🌷
Garden Club students have been hard at work mulching and planting flowers to help make their school beautiful for the season. ☀️
#dasdproud

We’re Hiring: Controller 💰

Location: DASD Central Office 📍
Application Deadline: 4/15/2026 ⏳
Start Date: 7/1/2026 🗓️

The Controller manages and analyzes all district cash and investments, prepares and analyzes district budget, and prepares monthly Board financial reports.

Additional responsibilities include:
• Reviews and analyzes payroll accounting and files tax returns
• Prepares financial analysis on expenditure, revenue, and budget data
• Develops ad-hoc reporting of financial data

Apply Now: Link in comments 🔗
#dasdproud #NowHiring #EducationJobs

Each year, our district's visual arts teachers have the opportunity to honor two students each by presenting their work in the DASD Art Gallery at Trestle Place. 

The selected works are digitally reproduced, framed, and placed in the James E. Watson Staff room for a two-year cycle, personalizing our space with the talent of our student artists.  

This evening we are proud to recognize the students and their teachers for their amazing talent. Thank you to Julie Dimino, the art department curriculum leader who coordinates this show, thank you to our art educators for their creative guidance and support and a very special thank you to these students for contributing their talents to this space!

Mismatch, but make it meaningful 💙✨
Bradford Heights Elementary School is rocking their mismatch styles for Autism Acceptance Month, because being yourself is always the best look. 🫶
#dasdproud #AutismAcceptanceMonth

Springton Manor Elementary School welcomed children’s book author Beth Ferry! 📚✨

Known for her children’s books such as Stick and Stone, Beth guided students through the writing and illustrating process from the spark of an idea to the characters and artwork that bring a story to life. Students enjoyed learning how stories come together through imagination and illustration. 📖
#dasdproud #SchoolLibraryMonth

Congratulations to West Bradford Elementary School’s Anwitha Ajith! 🎉

Anwitha earned second place in the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental Protection and Keep Pennsylvania Beautiful’s 2026 PA Litter Hawk Youth Art Competition. 🎨 The competition raises awareness about the impact of litter on the environment and encouraged students to show how we can help keep our communities litter-free in honor of America’s 250th birthday. 🇺🇸
#dasdproud

Happy National Assistant Principals Week! 🎉

We’re grateful for our assistant principals and the countless ways you lead, support, and show up for your school communities each day. Your work makes a meaningful difference for our students, staff, and families. 💙💛
#dasdproud #nationalassistantprincipalsweek

Happy Easter, DASD! Wishing those who celebrate a joyful day filled with blessings and happiness. 🐰✝️🌷

Learn more about #Easter traditions: Link in comments 🔗
#happyeaster

Happy National School Librarian Day! 📚

Our school librarians inspire a love of reading, support learning, and create a welcoming space for all students. Thank you for helping students turn the page to new opportunities every day! ✨📖
#dasdproud #NationalSchoolLibrarianDay

Congratulations to Downingtown East’s Sophia Pan for being selected as a 2026 Scholastic Art & Writing Awards National Winner! 🥇✨

Sophia will be honored at Carnegie Hall this June in recognition of this outstanding artistic achievement. 🎨
#dasdproud #dasdarts

“We are the agents of change…” 🎶

Second graders at Pickering Valley Elementary School brought their classroom learning into the halls, marching and singing while demonstrating that bravery and perseverance can make a positive impact in the world. ✨💬
#dasdproud

Acceptance is growing 🌱

On World Autism Awareness Day, we’re embracing our differences and spreading kindness. 🌏💙

Together, we celebrate what makes each of us one-of-a-kind. ✨
#dasdproud #WorldAutismAwarenessDay

Wishing all who celebrate a joyful and meaningful Passover filled with love, family, and tradition.

Chag Pesach Sameach! 💙🌟✡️

Learn more about #Passover traditions: Link in comments 🔗

Current status: Spring Recess 🌷☀️
Wishing our DASD community a safe, joyful, and relaxing break!
#dasdproud #spring

Happy Paraprofessional Appreciation Day!

Every day, our classroom support staff show up for students, offering support, encouragement, and care that help make our classrooms positive places to learn and grow. 🌟🏫

Thank you for the difference you make across DASD. 💙💛 
#dasdproud #ParaprofessionalAppreciationDay

April is Autism Acceptance Month! ♾️🫶

Across DASD, we’re celebrating the unique strengths and perspectives of individuals with autism and continuing to build a community where everyone feels a sense of belonging. 💙💛
 #dasdproud #AutismAcceptanceMonth

We’re all in this together… watching our LMS students shine on TV! ✨

Students from Lionville Middle School Musical Theater’s production of High School Musical are taking the spotlight on PHL17 Positively Philly! 

After their TikTok performance clips reached hundreds of thousands of viewers, the cast was invited to appear on the segment airing TOMORROW, April 1 at 9:00 AM. 🎬 

Watch it here: Link in comments 🔗
 #dasdproud

Nothing like a quick game of hoops to start the day 🏀

Superintendent Dr. O’Donnell stopped by Lionville Elementary this morning and joined students on the court during gym class! ⛹️‍♂️
#dasdproud 

*Video shows students and the superintendent playing basketball together in a gymnasium.
